SCPU Memory

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x0
Size:
0x60000000
Source:
scpu.rdl

Description

Memory map of the SCPU within the EIC770x SoC

Contents

Offset Identifier Name
0x01FFFFFF - -
0x02000000 clint -
0x0200C000 - -
0x0C000000 plic SCPU security peripherals (0x21Bxxxxx = SCPU view; MCPU alias at 0x51Bxxxxx)
0x0C000004 - -
0x21900000 spacc Synopsys DesignWare Security Protocol Accelerator (AES, SM4)
0x21900004 - -
0x21B00000 pka Synopsys DesignWare Public Key Accelerator (RSA, ECDSA)
0x21B00004 - -
0x21B04000 pka_sram PKA instruction SRAM
0x21B08000 trng Synopsys DesignWare True Random Number Generator
0x21B08004 - -
0x21B40000 otp OTPC
0x21B40048 - -
0x21B48000 otp_shadow OTP shadow / secure identity registers (~0x190 bytes)
0x21B48174 - -

0x21B80004 - -

0x21B88004 - -
